scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/schema && npm run build -w packages/runtime && npm run build -w apps/editor && npm run build -w apps/player
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/schema && npm run typecheck -w packages/runtime && npm run typecheck -w apps/editor && npm run typecheck -w apps/player
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/schema && npm run test -w packages/runtime && npm run test -w apps/editor && npm run test -w apps/player
